## [00:00 - 00:36]

Hello, I'm Randall Hurd. I'm one of the senior coaches here at Mastermind. It's so good to have you here in the program. Listen, my passion and my greatest desire for those of you who are going through this brand new MBS program is for you to understand this is not beyond you. This is not something that other people can do and you can't. I want you to have faith in the fact that you have all the proper tools that you need to build the life that you're trying to build. And I want to be one to congratulate you as you go through here.
